name: Beverly Hills Pickleball and Tennis Court
description: Beverly Hills Pickleball and Tennis Court is a place to play pickleball in Beverly Hills, FL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Bicentennial Park
description: Bicentennial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crystal River, FL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Citrus Springs
description: Citrus Springs is a place to play pickleball in Citrus Springs, FL. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights and wheelchair accessibility. The court is free.

name: Jim LeGrone Memorial Park
description: Jim LeGrone Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crystal River, FL. There are 4 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Meadowcrest - Lower Courts
description: Meadowcrest - Lower Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crystal River, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Meadowcrest residents and their guests only

name: Nature’s Resort
description: Nature’s Resort is a place to play pickleball in Homosassa, FL. There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pickleball in Citrus Hills
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball in Citrus Hills in Hernando, FL! There are 20 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Pine Ridge
description: Come play pickleball at Pine Ridge in Beverly Hills, FL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. Reservations are available.

name: Sugarmill Woods Inc - Oak Village Bath & Tennis Club
description: Sugarmill Woods Inc - Oak Village Bath & Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Homosassa, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Sweet Citrus Acres RV Resort
description:
The brand new courts at Sweet Citrus Acres are available for Public Events May-October.  All events will be posted or reserved by the Activity Director.  
Please reach out to Kristine Denzer @ kdenzer@sweetcitrusacres.com for more information.

name: Whispering Pines Park
description: Come play pickleball at Whispering Pines Park in Inverness, FL! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
